identity.name: Lukas & Laura's Family Travel Journal
identity.persona: The Modern Scrapbook - Warm, Adventurous, Organized Chaos
identity.vibe: A digital campfire where family stories are told. Not a corporate travel agent.
identity.emotional_archetype: Organic & Earthy (Archetype 1) mixed with Vibrant Play

layout_strategy.card_style: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-stone-100 hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1

Button.default: bg-primary text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold hover:bg-primary/90 transition-transform active:scale-95
Button.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary bg-transparent rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold hover:bg-primary/5

MapContainer.interaction: Focus on smooth zooming and custom markers using overlay views

MemoryCard.style: bg-white p-4 pb-12 shadow-md rotate-1 hover:rotate-0 transition-transform duration-300 relative
MemoryCard.effect: Add a 'tape' visual element at the top center using CSS ::before

Navbar.style: fixed top-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md rounded-full px-8 py-4 shadow-xl z-50 flex items-center gap-8 border border-stone-200/50

visual_enhancers.textures: Use a subtle paper grain texture overlay (opacity 0.03) on the main background to reduce digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.border_radius: rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for almost everything. Avoid sharp edges unless for specific 'ticket' UI elements.

instructions_to_main_agent.1: Install 'react-map-gl' or '@react-google-maps/api' for the map integration.
instructions_to_main_agent.2: Use Framer Motion for page transitions. Family websites should feel 'alive'.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: Implement the 'MemoryCard' component with the 'tape' effect for the photo gallery.
instructions_to_main_agent.4: The Packing List should be a drag-and-drop interface (use 'dnd-kit' or 'react-beautiful-dnd') or simple checklist with satisfying 'check' animations.
instructions_to_main_agent.5: Use the Google Maps API Key provided in the prompt context.
instructions_to_main_agent.6: Ensure the 'Family Profiles' section allows for custom avatars/emojis for the kids.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Fraunces'.
Avoid pure black (#000000). Use Deep Charcoal (#264653).
Buttons should be pill-shaped (rounded-full), not rectangular.
Use generous padding (p-8, p-12) to create breathing room.
Map markers should be custom circular avatars of the family members if possible, or fun icons.
